top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Next faces shareholder pressure over worker pay
top_signals.summary: Shareholders in Next are set to put pressure on the retail giant to take action on its “reliance” on low-paid labour.  At Next’s annual general meeting on Thursday, a group of investors will call on the retailer to take further action on worker pay and adopt the “real living wage” for all employees.  But the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rising hiring costs push British businesses to the brink
top_signals.summary: UK businesses are on the brink due to the government’s highly contentious employment rights agenda and cost hikes, following the first provisions of the Employment Rights Act, which came into force in April.  According to new research from Employment Hero, an AI-powered employment platform, more than half of UK businesses feel employing staff has “become more [...]
